values.content: =Generate a DETAILED feasibility study for a {{ $json.property_type }} project in {{ $json.property_location }}. Project name: {{ $json.name }}. Project description: {{ $json.description }}. Documents provided: {{ $('Normalize Input').item.json.document_summary }}. Include sections: Executive Summary (2-3 sentences); Timeline: phases, total duration, key milestones; Risk Analysis: 5-10 major risks with impact level and mitigation; Cost Breakdown: land, construction, design, contingency, total (INR); Recommendations: top 3-5 actionable items. Return STRICT JSON with these keys and shapes: executive_summary (string); timeline (object with total_months as a number and phases as an array of objects each having name and months); risk_analysis (object with risks as an array of 5-10 objects each having description, impact, mitigation, where impact is High, Medium or Low); cost_breakdown (object with currency set to INR plus land, construction, design, contingency and total as numbers in INR); recommendations (array of 3-5 strings); detailed_report (markdown string of 1500-2500 words covering all sections in depth). Respond with ONLY the JSON object. No markdown fences, no prose outside JSON.

options.system: You are a senior real estate feasibility analyst for co-living and hospitality projects in India. You always respond with a single valid JSON object and nothing else.

fieldValues.fieldValue: AI feasibility study generated and saved for review.

parameters.content:
## DD-1 Feasibility Study Generator
POST /webhook/feasibility-generator with JSON body: project_id (uuid, required), document_summary (optional).

Flow: fetch project from Supabase, ask Claude for a strict-JSON feasibility study, parse it defensively, save to feasibility_studies, log a communications row, respond to the caller.

Tester mode: NO email nodes anywhere - notifications are rows in communications/audit_logs only.
Manual step: repoint Supabase credential dsZvYaB5av1RwbxL to project https://fwzdhmobfcwsspobrvdl.supabase.co (service_role key).
